# Agent B — vyre-driver + vyre-driver-wgpu + vyre-driver-spirv

## Ownership (sole editor of these paths)

- `vyre-driver/**` (everything in the new crate)
- `vyre-driver-wgpu/**` (entire crate — this is a rename of `vyre-wgpu/`)
- `vyre-driver-spirv/**` (entire crate — this is a rename of `backends/spirv/`)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/core_indirect.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/dialect.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/enforce.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/interner.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/io.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/lowering.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/migration.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/mutation.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/op_def.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/registry.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/toml_loader.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/backend.rs` + `backend/` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/pipeline.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/routing.rs` + `routing/` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/diagnostics.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-core/src/error.rs` (deletes after move)
- `vyre-wgpu/` (entire tree — renamed to `vyre-driver-wgpu/`)
- `backends/spirv/` (entire tree — renamed to `vyre-driver-spirv/`)

### Forbidden paths (Agent A or C owns these)

- `vyre-core/src/ir/**`, `vyre-core/src/optimizer/**`, `vyre-core/src/lower.rs`,
  `vyre-core/src/match_result.rs`, `vyre-core/src/ir.rs`, `vyre-core/src/optimizer.rs`
- `vyre-core/src/ops/**` (Agent C / Agent A split)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/` algorithm subtrees: `buffer/`, `decode/`,
  `encode/`, `hash/`, `logical/`, `math/`, `security_detection/`,
  `stats/`, `string_matching/`, `string_similarity/`, `wgsl_byte_primitives/`,
  `workgroup/` (Agent C owns these)
- `vyre-core/src/dialect/mod.rs` — shared: Agent B removes its
  scaffolding declarations, Agent C removes dialect algorithm declarations.
  Merge on rebase.
- `vyre-core/src/cert.rs` + `cert/` — Agent C owns (moves to vyre-conform)
- `vyre-core/src/introspection.rs`, `test_migration.rs`, `bin/**`, `fuzz/**` —
  Agent C owns (moves to xtask or deletes)
- `vyre-foundation/**`, `vyre-ops/**`, `vyre-reference/**`, `conform/**`

### Shared files

- `vyre-core/src/lib.rs` — Agent B appends its re-exports, deletes
  `pub mod backend;`, `pub mod pipeline;`, `pub mod routing;`,
  `pub mod diagnostics;`, `pub mod error;`. Rebase-merge with A/C.
- `vyre-core/Cargo.toml` — Agent B adds `vyre-driver = { workspace = true }`.
- `Cargo.toml` (workspace root) — Agent B renames the `vyre-wgpu` and
  `backends/spirv` entries in `[workspace] members` to `vyre-driver-wgpu`
  and `vyre-driver-spirv`. Also adds `vyre-driver-wgpu` and
  `vyre-driver-spirv` to `[workspace.dependencies]` (replacing the
  existing `vyre-wgpu` entry).

## Tasks (in order)

| `vyre-core/src/dialect/mutation.rs` | `vyre-driver/src/registry/mutation.rs` |
| `vyre-core/src/dialect/migration.rs` | `vyre-driver/src/registry/migration.rs` |
| `vyre-core/src/dialect/toml_loader.rs` | `vyre-driver/src/registry/toml_loader.rs` |

### Task B.2 — Edit vyre-core/src/dialect/mod.rs

Remove the declarations for the files moved out:
```
pub mod core_indirect;
pub mod dialect;
pub mod enforce;
pub mod interner;
pub mod lowering;
pub mod migration;
pub mod mutation;
pub mod op_def;
pub mod registry;
pub mod toml_loader;
pub mod io;
```

Leave the `#[cfg(feature = "dialect-*")] pub mod <algorithm>;` lines —
those are Agent C's territory.

Add at the top (after the `//!` docs):
```rust
pub use vyre_driver::registry::{
    Dialect, DialectRegistration, DialectRegistry, OpDef, OpDefRegistration,
    OpBackendTarget, Target, Category, Signature, AttrType, AttrSchema,
    TypedParam, LoweringTable, LoweringCtx, NagaBuilder, SpirvBuilder,
    PtxBuilder, MetalBuilder, CpuRef, PtxModule, MetalModule,
    EnforceGate, EnforceVerdict, Chain, MutationClass, intern_string,
    InternedOpId, default_validator,
};
```

(Adjust the exact symbol list to match what was previously exposed.)

### Task B.3 — Write vyre-driver/src/lib.rs

```rust
//! vyre-driver — substrate-agnostic backend machinery.
//!
//! Registry, runtime, pipeline, routing, diagnostics, and the VyreBackend
//! trait. Backend-specific crates (vyre-driver-wgpu, vyre-driver-spirv)
//! depend on this crate and contribute lowerings via the inventory
//! collection mechanism.

pub mod registry;
pub mod backend;
mod backend_impl;
pub mod pipeline;
pub mod routing;
mod routing_inner;
pub mod diagnostics;
pub mod error;

pub use backend::{
    BackendError, BackendRegistration, CompiledPipeline, DispatchConfig,
    VyreBackend, MemoryRef, Memory, Executable, Compilable,
};
pub use registry::{DialectRegistry, OpDef, OpDefRegistration, /* ... full list */};
pub use pipeline::{compile /* etc. */};
pub use routing::{/* public exports */};
pub use diagnostics::{/* public exports */};
pub use error::Error;
```

(Exact re-export list matches what `vyre-core/src/lib.rs` exposed pre-move.)

### Task B.4 — Rename vyre-wgpu → vyre-driver-wgpu

```
git mv vyre-wgpu vyre-driver-wgpu
```

Edit `vyre-driver-wgpu/Cargo.toml`:
- Change `name = "vyre-wgpu"` → `name = "vyre-driver-wgpu"`
- Change `vyre = { ... }` dep to `vyre-driver = { workspace = true }` +
  `vyre-foundation = { workspace = true }` + `vyre-spec = { workspace = true }`.
  If any imports still need the `vyre` meta-crate, keep that dep too;
  otherwise remove.

Run `cargo fix --allow-dirty -p vyre-driver-wgpu` to update internal
import paths from `vyre::...` to `vyre_driver::...` or
`vyre_foundation::...` where appropriate. Any path that still points at
`vyre::` resolves through the shim and is fine.

### Task B.5 — Rename backends/spirv → vyre-driver-spirv

```
git mv backends/spirv vyre-driver-spirv
```

Edit `vyre-driver-spirv/Cargo.toml`:
- Change `name` to `vyre-driver-spirv`
- Update `vyre` dep to `vyre-driver` + `vyre-foundation` + `vyre-spec`

After Agent C deletes `backends/photonic/`, the `backends/` container
directory will be empty. Agent B removes it:
```
rmdir backends/
```
(Coordination note: Agent C may have already deleted the directory if
its commit lands first. Check `if [ -d backends ]; then rmdir backends;
fi` before acting. Either agent can own the final rmdir — it's idempotent.)

### Task B.5b — Accept the compiler_primitives WGSL shaders from Agent A

Per Agent A's Task A.7, the 6 `.wgsl` asset files at
`vyre-core/src/ir/transform/compiler/wgsl/` must land in
`vyre-driver-wgpu` because Law B forbids `.wgsl` assets in
`vyre-foundation`.

```
mkdir -p vyre-driver-wgpu/src/shaders/compiler_primitives/
git mv vyre-core/src/ir/transform/compiler/wgsl/*.wgsl \
       vyre-driver-wgpu/src/shaders/compiler_primitives/
rmdir vyre-core/src/ir/transform/compiler/wgsl/
```

Create `vyre-driver-wgpu/src/shaders/compiler_primitives/provider.rs`
that implements Agent A's `CompilerPrimitiveShaderProvider` trait:
```rust
use vyre_foundation::transform::compiler::shader_provider::CompilerPrimitiveShaderProvider;

pub struct WgpuCompilerPrimitiveShaders;

impl CompilerPrimitiveShaderProvider for WgpuCompilerPrimitiveShaders {
    fn wgsl_source(op: &str) -> Option<&'static str> {
        match op {
            "dataflow_fixpoint" => Some(include_str!("dataflow_fixpoint.wgsl")),
            "dominator_tree"    => Some(include_str!("dominator_tree.wgsl")),
            "recursive_descent" => Some(include_str!("recursive_descent.wgsl")),
            "string_interner"   => Some(include_str!("string_interner.wgsl")),
            "typed_arena"       => Some(include_str!("typed_arena.wgsl")),
            "visitor_walk"      => Some(include_str!("visitor_walk.wgsl")),
            _ => None,
        }
    }
}

inventory::submit! {
    vyre_foundation::transform::compiler::shader_provider::Registration {
        provider: &WgpuCompilerPrimitiveShaders,
    }
}
```

Run `cargo test --test compiler_dataflow_fixpoint_end_to_end` (and the
other 5 compiler-primitive end-to-end tests in `vyre-driver-wgpu/tests/`)
to verify the shader resolution round-trips correctly through the new
trait boundary.

Currently at `vyre-driver-wgpu/src/` root (post-rename): `pipeline.rs`,
`pipeline_bindings.rs`, `pipeline_compound.rs`, `pipeline_disk_cache.rs`,
`pipeline_persistent.rs`. Five files, one concept.

```
mkdir vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline/
git mv vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline.rs            vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline/mod.rs
git mv vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline_bindings.rs   vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline/bindings.rs
git mv vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline_compound.rs   vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline/compound.rs
git mv vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline_disk_cache.rs vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline/disk_cache.rs
git mv vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline_persistent.rs vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline/persistent.rs
```

Update `vyre-driver-wgpu/src/lib.rs` module declarations:
- `pub mod pipeline;` stays
- Delete the other four `mod` lines (or promote to `pub use pipeline::{bindings, compound, disk_cache, persistent};` if any were public)

Update `vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline/mod.rs` to add:
```rust
pub mod bindings;
pub mod compound;
pub mod disk_cache;
pub mod persistent;
```

### Task B.5d — Collapse `engine.rs`/`engine/` and `runtime.rs`/`runtime/` and `streaming.rs`/`streaming/` pairs

Same pattern as pipeline. At `vyre-driver-wgpu/src/`: both `engine.rs`
and `engine/` exist; both `runtime.rs` and `runtime/` exist. Inside
`engine/`: both `streaming.rs` and `streaming/` exist.

For each pair: merge the `.rs` file into the directory's `mod.rs`:
```
cat vyre-driver-wgpu/src/engine.rs >> vyre-driver-wgpu/src/engine/mod.rs
git rm vyre-driver-wgpu/src/engine.rs
```

Repeat for `runtime.rs` + `runtime/`, and `engine/streaming.rs` +
`engine/streaming/`. This matches the vyre module convention
(`clippy::module_inception` is already allowed in the workspace lints,
but removing the duplication is cleaner regardless).

### Task B.5e — Merge `conform/vyre-conform-{spec,generate,enforce,runner}` into single `vyre-conform`

Four tiny crates (2-3 files each) that forced-couple but ship separately.
Blueprint §4 called for one `vyre-conform` crate with feature flags.

Steps:
```
mkdir -p conform/vyre-conform/src/{spec,generate,enforce,runner}
git mv conform/vyre-conform-spec/src/*     conform/vyre-conform/src/spec/
git mv conform/vyre-conform-generate/src/* conform/vyre-conform/src/generate/
git mv conform/vyre-conform-enforce/src/*  conform/vyre-conform/src/enforce/
git mv conform/vyre-conform-runner/src/*   conform/vyre-conform/src/runner/
```

Create `conform/vyre-conform/Cargo.toml`:
```toml
[package]
name = "vyre-conform"
version = "0.1.0"
edition.workspace = true
# ... standard metadata ...
description = "Conformance certificate generation + verification for vyre. Four feature gates: spec, generate, enforce, runner."

[dependencies]
vyre-foundation = { workspace = true }
vyre-driver = { workspace = true }
vyre-spec.workspace = true
# merge of all deps from the 4 sub-crates

[features]
default = ["spec"]
spec = []
generate = ["spec"]
enforce = ["spec"]
runner = ["spec", "generate", "enforce"]
```

Create `conform/vyre-conform/src/lib.rs`:
```rust
//! vyre-conform — signed conformance certificates.
#[cfg(feature = "spec")]     pub mod spec;
#[cfg(feature = "generate")] pub mod generate;
#[cfg(feature = "enforce")]  pub mod enforce;
#[cfg(feature = "runner")]   pub mod runner;
```

Delete the 4 old crate directories:
```
git rm -rf conform/vyre-conform-spec
git rm -rf conform/vyre-conform-generate
git rm -rf conform/vyre-conform-enforce
git rm -rf conform/vyre-conform-runner
```

Update workspace root `Cargo.toml`:
- Remove the 4 old members, add `"conform/vyre-conform"`.
- Remove the 4 old workspace deps, add `vyre-conform = { version = "0.1.0", path = "conform/vyre-conform" }`.

If the cert logic moved from `vyre-core/src/cert.rs` by Agent C lands
here, integrate it under `conform/vyre-conform/src/spec/cert.rs` (or
whichever feature gate is appropriate).

### Task B.9 — Fix 6 lasting hot-path diseases in vyre-driver-wgpu

These are correctness + perf issues the previous AGENT2 plan called for
but did not fully land. They are scoped to Agent B because every fix
lives in `vyre-driver-wgpu/src/` or `vyre-driver/src/`.

**B.9.1 — Buffer pool O(N) linear scan** (`vyre-driver-wgpu/src/buffer/pool.rs`)

Current: `acquire()` at `:128-139` pops free-list entries whose
`usage` flags don't match the request and pushes them back — O(N)
churn on usage-flag mismatch. Eviction loop at `:227-243` walks `0..64`
classes on every release.

Fix: per-usage-flag sub-queue indexed by `(size_class, usage_hash)`.
Lookup is O(1). Maintain a `u64` non-empty-class bitset so eviction
picks the highest non-empty class via `trailing_zeros()`. Make
`ARRAY_QUEUE_CAPACITY` (currently hardcoded 1024) and `MAX_RETAINED_BYTES`
(currently 1 GiB) read from `DispatchConfig` (Tier-A TOML, wired at
Task B.9.3).

Acceptance: proptest in `vyre-driver-wgpu/tests/buffer_pool_allocs.rs`
that does 10,000 random acquire/release pairs and asserts total
allocations ≤ `log2(max_size) * usage_count`.

**B.9.2 — Program validation re-runs every dispatch** (`vyre-driver-wgpu/src/lib.rs`)

Current: `validate_with_cache()` at `:352-371` calls `program.to_wire()`
on every dispatch (a full program serialization) and looks up the hash
in a `RwLock<FxHashMap>` with no eviction.

Fix:
- Cache the content-hash once on `Program` construction via
  `OnceLock<blake3::Hash>`. No per-dispatch serialization. This is a
  foundation-tier change; if `Program` is in `vyre-foundation`, Agent B
  coordinates with Agent A via `.internals/coordination/B-to-A-program-hash.md`
  to land the `OnceLock` field (additive, doesn't violate frozen contract).
- Replace `RwLock<FxHashMap>` with `dashmap::DashMap` (already added as a
  workspace dep in Phase 0 commit).
- Bound the cache to `MAX_VALIDATION_CACHE_ENTRIES = 1024` with LRU
  eviction.

Acceptance: bench `vyre-driver-wgpu/benches/dispatch_hot_path.rs` shows
≥ 80% reduction in per-dispatch time when the same Program is dispatched
repeatedly (measured cache-hit vs cache-miss).

**B.9.3 — DFA scanner readback waste** (`vyre-driver-wgpu/src/engine/dfa.rs`)

Current: `:310` copies `max_matches * 12` bytes on every scan regardless
of how many matches occurred. Default `max_matches` = 65,536 = 786 KB
per scan. 99% of scans have < 100 matches → wasted bandwidth on every
one.

Fix: indirect dispatch writes the match count to a dedicated 4-byte
buffer first; the payload copy dispatches conditionally on the count,
reading only `captured * 12` bytes. Use
`encoder.copy_buffer_to_buffer_indirect` if supported, otherwise submit
a second encoder after reading the 4-byte count.

Also fix: `:317-319` has `match self.device.poll(...) { _ => {} }`
swallowing `MaintainResult::{Queued, Empty}` — can read uninitialized
bytes if the queue returns early. Replace with a loop on
`Maintain::wait_for(submission)` until done, error on disconnect.

Also fix: `resources` pool at `:206-226` uses `Mutex<Vec>` with linear
scan. Replace with `[ArrayQueue<ScanResources>; NUM_SIZE_CLASSES]`
keyed by `input_len.next_power_of_two().trailing_zeros()`.

Delete the `#[deprecated]` `scan()` method at `:165-179`. Per LAW 9,
deprecated-waiting-room is evasion.

**B.9.4 — Streaming engine `Mutex<Receiver>` anti-pattern** (`vyre-driver-wgpu/src/engine/streaming/mod.rs`)

Current at `:41-46`: `Arc<Mutex<mpsc::Receiver<Job>>>` — every worker
serializes at `receiver.lock()`. Hardcoded worker cap at 4.

Fix: `crossbeam-channel::unbounded()` (cloneable receiver, lock-free,
already a workspace dep). Worker count from
`DispatchConfig::stream_workers`, defaulting to
`std::thread::available_parallelism()`.

Remove `catch_unwind` at `:86-93`. If a worker panics, propagate as
`BackendError` with panic payload — process decides whether to abort.

**B.9.5 — Async copy spawns OS thread per task** (`vyre-driver-wgpu/src/engine/streaming/async_copy.rs`)

Current at `:42`: `thread::spawn(copy)` per `async_load` call. 10K tags
in flight = 10K threads.

Fix: shared `rayon::ThreadPool` (rayon already in workspace deps)
constructed once in a `LazyLock<ThreadPool>`. `async_load` enqueues a
task that writes to a `OnceLock<Result<(), BackendError>>`. `async_wait`
reads the `OnceLock` (polling or `thread::park` depending on arrival).

Acceptance: adversarial test `async_copy_10k_concurrent` spawns 10,000
async_loads, observes max thread count via
`std::thread::available_parallelism` thresholds. Assert ≤ N workers
used regardless of tag count.

**B.9.6 — Readback ring O(N) inflight count** (`vyre-driver-wgpu/src/runtime/readback_ring.rs`)

Current at `:206-211`: `inflight = slots.iter().filter(...).count()`
iterates every slot on every dispatch.

Fix: maintain `inflight: AtomicU64` incremented in `begin_dispatch`,
decremented in `complete_slot` / `release_slot`. Remove the filter-count.

**B.9.7 — Group 0 hardcoded in lowering/reflection** (two sites)

Current:
- `vyre-driver-wgpu/src/pipeline/bindings.rs:12` — `declared_bindings()`
  only scans for `@group(0)` literally.
- If `vyre-core/src/lower/` (now in foundation) hardcoded group 0 in
  emitted WGSL, that's also broken.

Fix: honor `BufferDecl::group: u8` from the program. Emit
`var<push_constant>` for small uniforms. Bindings reflection parses
whichever `@group(N)` the shader actually declares.

Coordination with Agent A: if `BufferDecl` needs a new `group: u8`
field, that's additive to a frozen contract and requires the
`.internals/coordination/` note. Likely the field already exists;
audit first.

**B.9.8 — Benchmark excludes buffer allocation** (`benches/vs_cpu_baseline.rs`)

Current: measures steady-state warm-dispatch without upload.

Fix per AGENT2 plan §E.1: rename the existing bench to
`warm_dispatch_only`. Add a new headline bench `cold_dispatch_end_to_end`
that includes Program build, validation, shader compilation, buffer
upload, dispatch, readback. CSV export both to `benches/baselines/`.

Commit one bench result set to `.internals/baselines/v0.6-pre-restructure.csv`
so v0.6.1 can regression-test the restructure.

### Task B.10 — Compile gate

```
cargo build -p vyre-driver                        # must succeed
cargo build -p vyre-driver-wgpu                   # must succeed
cargo build -p vyre-driver-spirv                  # must succeed
cargo build -p vyre --no-default-features         # must succeed
cargo test -p vyre-driver                         # must pass
cargo test -p vyre-driver-wgpu                    # must pass
```

Dep audit: `cargo tree -p vyre-driver` must depend on
`vyre-foundation` and `vyre-spec` but NOT on `vyre-ops` (stdlib) or on
any backend-specific crate.

`cargo tree -p vyre-driver-wgpu` must depend on `vyre-driver` and
`vyre-foundation` and `wgpu`+`naga`, but NOT on `vyre-ops`.

### Task B.11 — No TODOs, no stubs, no evasion

Same rules as Agent A. Moved files keep their functionality. No
`todo!()`, no weakened tests, no "deprecated" markers on things that
were working.

## Commit message

```
vyre §B: extract vyre-driver, rename vyre-wgpu and spirv backend

Moves dialect scaffolding (registry, op_def, interner, lowering,
enforce, mutation, migration, toml_loader, io, core_indirect),
backend trait, pipeline, routing, diagnostics, and error into a new
vyre-driver crate.

Renames vyre-wgpu → vyre-driver-wgpu and backends/spirv →
vyre-driver-spirv so the layer is explicit in the crate name. Updates
workspace members and workspace dependencies accordingly.

vyre-core re-exports everything moved; downstream consumers compile
unchanged.

Part of the v0.6 restructure per .internals/planning/COMPUTE_2_0.md.
```

## Done when

1. `vyre-driver` crate exists with all moved subtrees.
2. `vyre-wgpu/` directory no longer exists (renamed to `vyre-driver-wgpu/`).
3. `backends/spirv/` directory no longer exists (renamed to `vyre-driver-spirv/`).
4. `cargo build` on all three crates succeeds.
5. `cargo test` on all three crates passes.
6. `cargo build -p vyre` succeeds.
7. `vyre-core/src/backend.rs`, `pipeline.rs`, `routing.rs`, `diagnostics.rs`,
   `error.rs`, and the 11 dialect scaffolding files no longer exist.
8. `vyre-core/src/dialect/mod.rs` no longer declares scaffolding modules.
9. Workspace Cargo.toml reflects the renames.
10. Single commit pushed to main.
